extension.summary: Manage Arr media and Bazarr subtitles from Kodi.
extension.description: Kodi-native Request & Search, interactive Radarr/Sonarr release selection, service dashboard, monitoring, queue, Bazarr subtitle download, deletion, exclusion and replacement controls.
extension.news: Add Request & Search for unmanaged media, Arr-authoritative interactive release selection, a bounded service dashboard, optional read-only Prowlarr context, and Bazarr integration with Kodi's built-in subtitle downloader. Preserve configurable menus, automatic repository updates and PIN-protected destructive actions.
